description: Tasks template for modernization plan. Deploy PhotoAlbum Java application to Azure Container Apps.

tasks.description: Verify and update the existing Dockerfile for Azure Container Apps deployment
tasks.requirements: Verify that the existing Dockerfile at the project root is compatible with Azure Container Apps deployment. Ensure it builds a production-ready container image using Java 17, exposes port 8080, and sets the SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE to azure for the H2 in-memory database profile. Update the Dockerfile if necessary to ensure compatibility with Azure Container Registry and Azure Container Apps.
tasks.taskSummary: Verified existing Dockerfile uses Java 17 multi-stage build with eclipse-temurin base images, exposes port 8080, and is compatible with Azure Container Apps. Added SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=azure environment variable to activate the H2 in-memory database profile for Azure deployment.

tasks.description: Deploy the PhotoAlbum application to Azure Container Apps using Bicep infrastructure
tasks.requirements: Deploy the PhotoAlbum containerized application to Azure Container Apps. Use the existing Bicep infrastructure templates in the infra/ folder to provision Azure resources including Azure Container Registry, Azure Container Apps Environment, Log Analytics workspace, and Application Insights. Build and push the container image to Azure Container Registry, then deploy to Azure Container Apps with external ingress on port 8080, managed identity for ACR pull, and the azure Spring profile activated.
tasks.resourceStatus: Existing Bicep templates in infra/ folder will provision new resources
